metadata.name: PF-id-registry-local
metadata.description: Project-local ID Registry — prefixes consumed by scripts running in cwd=project (PRJ-001+). Per Centralized Framework Management proposal §3.1: cross-project prefixes (PF-IMP, PF-PRO, PF-FEE, PF-REV, PF-EVR, PRJ, PF-SST) live in appdev's central registry and are NOT duplicated here. Backfilled by PF-IMP-879 (2026-05-28) to canonical schema produced by Initialize-ProjectLocalRegistry. Counter values for PF-STA and PF-TMP preserved from the legacy registry at process-framework-local/PF-id-registry-local.json; cross-project counters are already absorbed into appdev's central PF-id-registry-central.json (seeded 2026-05-09 from max(PRJ-001, PRJ-002) + 1).
metadata.id_gaps_policy: Gaps in ID sequences are expected. IDs are consumed by scripts at creation time; if the script fails or the output is discarded, the ID is not reclaimed. Do not manually reassign or fill gaps.
